issues.description: § 38 BDSG section says 'Wer personenbezogene Gesundheitsdaten in einem Umfang verarbeitet, der zur regelmäßigen und systematischen Überwachung von Betroffenen geeignet ist, muss einen Datenschutzbeauftragten benennen.' This conflates the DSGVO Art. 37(1)(b) trigger with § 38 BDSG. The primary § 38 BDSG threshold is: mindestens 20 Personen ständig mit der automatisierten Verarbeitung personenbezogener Daten beschäftigen. The 'regelmäßige und systematische Überwachung' criterion is Art. 37 DSGVO, not § 38 BDSG.

Core claims are accurate: DSGVO Vorrang, Öffnungsklauseln (Art. 9 Abs. 4, Art. 88, Art. 85), § 22 BDSG for health data, § 27 BDSG for research exceptions, § 42 BDSG criminal sanctions (up to 3 years). BfDI oversight of federal authorities confirmed.
3 sources present: gesetze-im-internet.de (authoritative), bfdi.bund.de (authoritative), Wikipedia. Good source diversity.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct the § 38 BDSG Datenschutzbeauftragter description: the primary trigger is '20 Personen ständig mit automatisierter Verarbeitung'. The 'regelmäßige und systematische Überwachung' criterion applies to Art. 37 DSGVO (not § 38 BDSG). Update to: '§ 38 BDSG verpflichtet Verantwortliche, die mindestens 20 Personen ständig mit der automatisierten Verarbeitung personenbezogener Daten beschäftigen, einen Datenschutzbeauftragten zu benennen.'

issues.description: IPsec + IKEv2 protocol confirmed by gemSpec_VPN_ZugD. Certificate-based authentication confirmed. The claim of 'über 19 zugelassene Anbieter' matches previously verified count.
99.9% SLA requirement stated without a direct gemSpec source URL in the article. Plausible but unverified in this cycle.
TI 2.0 transition to mTLS/TI-Gateway and 2027 VPN shutdown timeline are consistent with other TI 2.0 articles.

Timeline table is incorrect for primary use rules. Article states 'Anwendung Primärnutzungsregeln: 2 Jahre nach Inkrafttreten (ca. 2027)' and 'Vollständige MyHealth@EU-Teilnahme aller Mitgliedstaaten: Bis 2029'. Per EU 2025/327, the actual application date for primary use exchange (Patient Summary, ePrescriptions) is March 2029 (4 years after entry into force), not 2027. The 2027 date is when the Commission must adopt implementing acts, not when data sharing is mandatory.

EHDS entry into force as 26 März 2025 (article says 'März 2025') confirmed. EU 2025/327 regulation number confirmed. DVKA as NCPeH operator and gematik as specification authority confirmed. MyHealth@EU Wave 10 2026 for Germany confirmed.
Sekundärnutzungsregeln 2029 is correct (also March 2029). Secondary use and primary use (first group) both apply from March 2029.
3 sources: EC health portal (authoritative), EUR-Lex full text (authoritative), gematik NCPeH page. Good quality.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct the timeline table: 'Anwendung Primärnutzungsregeln' should be '4 Jahre nach Inkrafttreten (März 2029)', not 2027. Remove or relabel the 2027 row as 'Implementing acts by Commission (Durchführungsrechtsakte)'. The table should read: Inkrafttreten März 2025, Durchführungsrechtsakte der Kommission März 2027, Anwendung Primär- und Sekundärnutzungsregeln (erste Gruppe) März 2029, Vollständige Teilnahme bis März 2031.

issues.description: Article states 'rund 375 Gesundheitsämter'. Bundesgesundheitsministerium data as of 2026 shows 377 health offices. 'Rund 375' is acceptable but slightly low.
ÖGD Pakt 4 Milliarden Euro and 5.000 Stellen bis 2026 confirmed by BMG. As of end 2024, 5.210 positions were actually created (exceeding target). DEMIS as Pflichtanwendung confirmed.
SORMAS as open-source software used in health offices during COVID-19 pandemic is correct. FHIR-based DEMIS meldungen confirmed.
4 sources: BMG (authoritative), RKI (authoritative), Wikipedia, RKI DEMIS page. Good diversity.

articles.fixInstructions: Optionally update 'rund 375 Gesundheitsämter' to 'rund 377 Gesundheitsämter' for accuracy.

issues.description: Article states 'EY Consulting GmbH erhielt den Auftrag zur Entwicklung und Wartung'. The GitHub copyright and gematik announcement reference 'EY Strategy and Transactions GmbH' (not 'EY Consulting GmbH'). The contract (Auftrag) was with EY for development of central Zero-Trust software components — confirmed by heise.de and gematik newsroom. Entity name is slightly inaccurate.

15 Dezember 2025 Open Source release on GitHub confirmed. ZETA-Client-SDK and ZETA-Guard as the two core components confirmed. VSDM 2.0 as first productive use in mid-2026 confirmed. Full TI migration to 2029 is consistent with other articles.
4 sources: gematik newsroom ZETA release (authoritative), gematik newsroom EY contract (authoritative), gematik TI 2.0 page, GitHub. Strong source set.

articles.fixInstructions: Correct EY entity name from 'EY Consulting GmbH' to 'EY Strategy and Transactions GmbH' to match the actual copyright and contract entity.

Hilfsmittelverordnungen Pflicht ab 1. Juli 2026 — widely reported but no source URL in the article.

DiGA-Verordnungen 'seit Januar 2026': The pilot ran May–September 2025, and nationwide rollout was recommended for revision before launch. Article previously said Oktober 2025, now says Januar 2026. The actual status of the nationwide rollout is contested — industry association recommended postponing in current form.
Only 2 sources, both gematik. Minimum met but source diversity is weak.

articles.fixInstructions: Add a source for Hilfsmittelverordnungen Pflicht ab 1. Juli 2026. Clarify 'DiGA-Verordnungen seit Januar 2026' — the pilot ran until September 2025 but a nationwide rollout in its current form was recommended for revision by SVDGV. Add a source or soften the claim.

EU 2025/327 actual text: primary use exchange (Patient Summary, ePrescriptions) applies from March 2029 (4 years). The 2027 deadline is for Commission implementing acts, not for operational data exchange.
